An adaptable, vocal bird with brown plumage and yellow skin around the eyes.

A honeyeater with a bare black head and a distinct 'knob' on its bill.

Iconic songbird; males are bright red with a black face and prominent crest.

A large white seabird with black wing tips and a yellowish head; a spectacular diver.

A wading bird with very long toes for walking on floating vegetation.
Highly intelligent songbird capable of mimicking hundreds of other bird songs.

Unique nocturnal, fruit-eating bird that uses echolocation in caves.

Famous for the male's massive, iridescent tail fan decorated with colorful eye-spots.
The fastest animal on earth, capable of reaching over 320 km/h during its hunting stoop.

One of the world's largest and most powerful eagles, featuring a shaggy crest and a massive bill.

description: Males are a spectacular gold and black; they build bowers to attract mates.

Known for its spectacular, fan-shaped crest that is usually held flat.
